title: Dragon Mounts: More Dragons
description: New breeds for the mod Dragon Mounts: Legacy
body:
REQUIERES [Dragon Mounts: Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-mounts-legacy)

REQUIERES [BjornLib]([https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-mounts-legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/bjornlib))

This mod adds new breeds for Dragon Mounts: Legacy

# Cherry Dragon

![CHERRY DRAGON](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6c9fDm6s/images/f1b063f3c015725dc41ecfe575de28c0370c00ce.png)

![CHERRY DRAGON FLY](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6c9fDm6s/images/240c1118f213c116d7e04f1578f2468cdd86b34d.png)

<font size="4">Every 25 seconds the cherry dragon heals its owner if the owner has full health it gives him 2 and a half hearts of absorption.</font>

# Breed

![CHERRY BREED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6c9fDm6s/images/93111e26cdf737f49b49f5543d852c5c5ca6c3f6.png)

<font size="4">Cover the dragon egg with cherry logs to get the Cherry Dragon Egg.</font>

# Sculk Dragon

![SCULKDRAGON](https://imgur.com/yUo1n3f.png)

![SCULKFLY](https://imgur.com/Nvz7FUZ.png)

<font size="4">Every 25 seconds the sculk dragon gives experience to the owner if he is riding the dragon..</font>

# Breed

![SCULKBREED](https://imgur.com/gnTfNgv.png)

<font size="4">Cover the dragon egg with Sculk Blocks to get the Sculk Dragon Egg.</font>



# Rudolph Dragon

![RUDOLPH DRAGON](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6c9fDm6s/images/a28e3aac4ea2ef80f47e3716898d5dc678be6dfd_350.webp)

This dragon will regenerate its owner's hunger when he is close to it.

The dragon is tamed with cookies.

The dragon breeds with cookies.

Breed - Cover the dragon egg with Coal Blocks to get the Rudolph Dragon Egg.


# Soul Sand Dragon



Every 4 seconds slows all mobs around the dragon except for players.

The dragon is tamed with Soul Sand Block.

The dragon breeds with Soul Sand Block.

Breed - Cover the dragon egg with Bone Blocks to get the Soul Sand Dragon Egg.



# Jack o'Lantern Dragon



This dragron produces terror to the mobs around him causing them to run away.

The dragon is tamed with Pumpkin Block.

The dragon breeds with Pumpkin Block.

Breed - Cover the dragon egg with Pumpkin Blocks to get the Jack o'Lantern Dragon Egg.


# Warped

Ability - destroys any enemy projectile that approaches it .

Taming and Breed Item - Warped Fungus.

Breed - Cover the dragon egg with Warped Wart Blocks to get the Warped Dragon Egg.

# Specter

Ability - Continuously damages the target mob.

Taming and Breed Item - Phantom Membrane.

Breed - Cover the dragon egg with Coarse Dirt to get the Specter Dragon Egg.

# Red Mushroom

Ability - From time to time damages the target with a burst of poison.

Taming and Breed Item - Red Mushroom.

Breed - Cover the dragon egg with Red Mushroom Block to get the Red Mushroom Dragon Egg.
